title: New Weapons
description: Adds new weapons to Minecraft. Can be used with Epic Fight if datapacks are active.
body:
This mod adds a variety of weapons, including double-bladaded axes, claymores, and more. Each weapon can be made out of vanilla materials(Currently not included).
Datapack link: [EF compatiability](https://modrinth.com/datapack/songfuls-epic-fight-datapack)
(Note that you must put the addon in your datapack folder, or it won't work)
I will redo the texture's to make them look more modernised. Be advised that on Cursefoge, it is called Songful's New Weapons.

Feel free to make a video on this mod
Mod pack was made with Mcreator. Made by SongfulTulip
